label: Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion
description: Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion is a fortified city raised on fused basalt terraces above an ash-choked basin, its curtain walls faced in black vitrified stone that resists abrasive stormfall. Hab-stacks and manufactorum blocks stand in tight, interlocked tiers, connected by enclosed skyways and shielded causeways that blunt electrostatic gusts and violet lightning. Beacon pylons and void-signal relays dominate the skyline, their housings overbuilt against constant vox interference and auroral backwash from the rift-lit nightside. The city’s outer approaches are defined by graded ash berms, slagcrete kill-zones, and scavenged wreck-plate revetments taken from the planet’s neglected orbital debris fields.
